'''√th-p-k''' ('''kathapak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lambaste|lambaste]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lambaste|lambaste]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √th-p-k
|-
! Lemma
| kathapak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thithapak || jithapak || shithapak || kithapak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthuthapak || jujuthapak || shushuthapak || kukuthapak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thuthapak || juthapak || shuthapak || kuthapak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thuthapak || juthapak || shuthapak || kuthapak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thethapak || jethapak || shethapak || kethapak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothothapak || jojothapak || shoshothapak || kokothapak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thothapak || jothapak || shothapak || kothapak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thothapak || jothapak || shothapak || kothapak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thapak || thapak || thapak || thapak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thapak || thapak || thapak || thapak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thapak || thapak || thapak || thapak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thapak || thapak || thapak || thapak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæthapak || jæthapak || shæthapak || kæthapak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathathapak || jajathapak || shashathapak || kakathapak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thathapak || jathapak || shathapak || kathapak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thathapak || jathapak || shathapak || kathapak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shathapak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshathapak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishathapak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shathapaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshathapaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishathapaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shathapakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshathapaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishathapakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shathapakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshathapaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishathapakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shathapakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshathapaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishathapakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shathapaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshathapaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishathapaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shathapakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshathapaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishathapakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shathapakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshathapaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishathapakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shathapakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshathapaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishathapakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shathapaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshathapaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishathapaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shathapaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathapaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathapaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shathapaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshathapaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathapaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shathapakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshathapaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishathapakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shathapakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathapaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathapakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shathapakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshathapaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathapakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shathapakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshathapaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishathapakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shathapakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshathapaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishathapakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shathapakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshathapaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishathapakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shathapakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshathapaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishathapakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shathapakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshathapaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishathapakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shathapakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshathapaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishathapakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
